body: import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;
import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException;
import org.junit.Test;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertTrue;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertArrayEquals;
import static org.junit.Assert.fail;

translation: self.__assertIOException("CR must be followed by LF", "=\rn")
self.__assertIOException("CR must be followed by LF", "=\r\r")
clearText = "If you believe that truth=beauty, then surely mathematics is the most beautiful" + \
encoded = "If you believe that truth=3Dbeauty, then surely=20=\r\n" + \
"mathematics is the most beautiful branch of philosophy."
clearText = "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog."
encoded = "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog."
assert messageText in em, f"Expected to find {messageText} in '{em}'"

body: private static final String US_ASCII_CHARSET = "US-ASCII";
